subcodes.first_line: O Possessor of wisdom and challenger of fate, the loftiest intentions of thy noble endeavors in the city of Beirut are now laid bare [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای صاحب تدبیر و معارض تقدیر عکادن قرادن بیروته گتمکدن مراد عالیلری مکشوف
subcodes.subjects: @collection; ordering of the Sacred Writings, @symbolism, @wisdom [hikmat], @chastisement and requital, @spiritual transformation
